# Victor Thuo
> Experience Design Strategy, Customer Experience, Behavior Change, AI & Digital Transformation
> For detailed case studies and articles: https://victorthuo.com/llms-full.txt

## About
Victor Thuo is a design, innovation and digital strategy expert with nearly a decade of experience and impact through design innovation. Based in Greater Boston, he has a proven ability to lead and manage complex design, digital transformation, and change management engagements for clients across various industries including business consulting, healthcare, financial services, automotive, and enterprise technology. He champions the sharing of best practices within the field of behavioral design.

## Key Outcomes
- 7,800+ users on Gen AI platform
- 2X developer productivity increase
- 5X growth
- 90% cost reduction
- 40% cloud infrastructure savings
- 31,000+ error-free ERP migrations
- 89% audience reach

## Expertise
- Behavioral Design
- Experience Design
- Digital Strategy
- Change Management
- Product Adoption
- Enterprise UX
- Healthcare UX
